title: Totem Tweaks
description: Makes Totems of Undying less obtrusive!
body:
## ✅ Pack Features

- Lowers Totem of Undying held in first person view, reduces the size of totem pop particles, and shrinks the first person totem pop animation to make totems less obtrusive!
- Note: This does NOT change the texture of the Totem.
- Unresolvable side effects: Totems become smaller when displayed on an item frame. This isn't a bug, it's an unintended and unresolvable effect of using the vanilla method.

## ℹ️ Frequently Asked Questions

**Q:** What Minecraft versions is this resource pack compatible with?

**A:** This resource pack should be compatible with Java Minecraft versions 1.11.1 and up, and does **NOT** require Optifine. If you are playing in a version below 1.21, you can safely ignore the "made for a new version of Minecraft" warning (unless you're playing on a version below 1.11.1 of course).

**Q:** What is your backstory behind making this resource pack?

**A:** When playing Crystal PvP, I become very annoyed when somebody pops my totem, and I become totally blind for a good second or two. I also hated the fact that totem particles were thrown everywhere, hindering my vision even further. And when holding the totem in my offhand, the totem blocked a good percentage of my screen. 

That's why, I decided to make this resource pack to solve all my totem problems! It makes the totem pop animation smaller so I can still see when I pop my totem, it also makes totem particles smaller so it's less obtrusive, AND it lowers the totem when held in my offhand and mainhand! Isn't that amazing?

## 💟 Love the things I do?

- Show your support by following this project! 🥰
- Check out my other projects here as well: https://modrinth.com/user/PhanZon/

## 🤝 Terms and Conditions of Use

**You are allowed to:** 
- Do _whatever_ you want to this Resource Pack **as long as** it's for **PERSONAL USE ONLY.**
- Modify this Resource Pack for public use **as long as** it's free for the community to use, you do not monetize it, you credit me in a clear way, **and** link back to this page.

**You are NOT allowed to:**

- Distribute this Resource Pack **without** crediting me in a clear way and/or linking back to this page.
- Reupload this Resource Pack as is (**without** proper modifications and/or additions).
- Put **any kind** of paywall restriction or monetization on **any parts** of this Resource Pack.
- Distribute this Resource Pack in a way that **does not** abide by the license used [(CC BY-NC-SA)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

**A template you can use to credit me:**

### Credits:
- [Resource Pack Name] by PhanZon: [Link back to this page]

Anything is fine **as long as** it clearly shows my name and a link back to this page!
